steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
The angles of triangle $RST$ sum to $180^\circ$:
$$42+x+(5x-6)=180$$
$$6x+36=180$$
$$x=24$$

steps.title: Find angle T
steps.content:
Substitute $x=24$ into the expression for angle $T$:
$$5(24)-6=114$$

steps.title: Use parallel lines
steps.content: Because side $LK$ is parallel to side $RT$, angle $SKL$ corresponds to angle $T$, so it has the same measure. The answer is 114.
